name: Dappier
description: AI-optimized web content and news retrieval

setupSteps.title: Sign up at platform.dappier.com
setupSteps.instructions: Create a free account (no credit card required for starter tier).

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.instructions: In the dashboard, navigate to API Keys and click Create new key.

setupSteps.title: Paste below + Save
setupSteps.instructions: Copy the key (starts with dap_) and paste below.
